exception.message: The following asserts failed: Cart page heading match expected [Shopping Cart (10.00kg)] but found [false], Should be on checkout page expected [true] but found [false], Stock warning should NOT show for qty=1 normal checkout expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Cart page heading match expected [Shopping Cart (10.00kg)] but found [false], Should be on checkout page expected
